posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title:
There were 700,000 illegal immigrants from India in 2022. 

Then ~97,000 entered/overstayed during fiscal year 2023. 

~90,415 more in FY 2024.

From 2009 to 2024 the US only deported 16,000 Indian nationals.

There is just shy of one million illegal Indian immigrants in America.

There were 700,000 illegal immigrants from India in 2022. 

Then ~97,000 entered/overstayed during fiscal year 2023. 

~90,415 more in FY 2024.

From 2009 to 2024 the US only deported 16,000 Indian nationals.

There is just shy of one million illegal Indian immigrants in America.
